reason: Parent shared requirements: single consent flag (telemetryEnabled) both tools reuse, privacy red-lines (no content ever), Sentry-specific hardening (sendDefaultPii=false, IP off, beforeSend scrub, no content in breadcrumbs), dependency budget.

Telemetry section documents the pattern to mirror (single gate + sole-import boundary + shared telemetryEnabled flag + Settings General toggle to wire one line into); plus build/test conventions (standalone swiftc runners + Makefile test-all) and codesign notes for a new signed SPM dep + Info.plist DSN.
Codesign/Info.plist gotchas — adding a new signed SPM dependency (sentry-cocoa) and a DSN Info.plist key; keep plutil -lint clean.
